description_long: This object is a thick, irregularly shaped slice of bread with a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy white interior. The crumb is interspersed with visible inclusions of raisins or similar dried fruit, giving it a speckled appearance. The crust is slightly uneven and appears to be well-baked, with a matte finish and some darker toasted areas. The sides of the bread show a clear distinction between the crust and the soft interior, with the crust wrapping around the edges. The bottom and top surfaces are both crusted, while the interior is fluffy and porous. There are no visible packaging, branding, or labels on the bread.
description: A thick slice of raisin bread with a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy white interior dotted with raisins. The crust is uneven and well-baked, contrasting with the fluffy crumb.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cut face of the bread, revealing the white, airy crumb with scattered raisins and a surrounding golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: This side view displays the full height of the bread slice, emphasizing the thick, continuous brown crust and the narrow profile.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the uncut, flat crusted surface, showing a smooth, golden-brown exterior with no visible crumb.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the height and thickness of the bread, with a slightly darker, more textured crust than the other side.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is golden-brown, slightly uneven, and matte, with some darker toasted patches and no visible scoring or flour dusting. The surface appears rustic and natural, without seeds or decorative markings.
